error[E0277]: `main` has invalid return type `i32`
 --> benchmark_results/2026-05-10T00-24-35/gpt-4o-mini/conversions/pointers_c2/sample_001/target.rs:1:14
  |
1 | fn main() -> i32 {
  |              ^^^ `main` can only return types that implement `Termination`
  |

warning: trait objects without an explicit `dyn` are deprecated
 --> benchmark_results/2026-05-10T00-24-35/gpt-4o-mini/conversions/pointers_c2/sample_001/target.rs:5:14
  |
5 |     let pc: &const i32 = p; // equivalent to const int*
  |              ^^^^^^^^^
  |
  = warning: this is accepted in the current edition (Rust 2015) but is a hard error in Rust 2021!
  = note: for more information, see <https://doc.rust-lang.org/edition-guide/rust-2021/warnings-promoted-to-error.html>
  = note: `#[warn(bare_trait_objects)]` (part of `#[warn(rust_2021_compatibility)]`) on by default
help: if this is a dyn-compatible trait, use `dyn`
  |
5 |     let pc: &dyn const i32 = p; // equivalent to const int*
  |              +++
